marketing.tagline: Every person carries a name that was always theirs. Begin the ritual to discover yours.

landing.reassurance: There are no right or wrong answers. Giantverse doesn't judge who you are—it helps you discover who you've always been.

whatIs.heading: What is Giantverse?
whatIs.p1: Every civilization tells stories about heroes.
whatIs.p2: Giantverse imagines a world where every person belongs to a unique archetype.
whatIs.p3: Your personality, motivations and instincts place you naturally within one of thirty-two archetypes spread across five living realms.
whatIs.p4: The goal isn't to label you. The goal is to help you understand yourself.

lands.heading: The Five Lands
lands.intro: Five living realms shape every Giantverse continent. Hover or tap a land to open its story.

Neisei.landscape: Endless coastline — harbors, tide-markets, and roads that all lead to the sea.
Neisei.philosophy: Nothing grows in isolation; every stranger is a bridge not yet crossed.
Neisei.identity: Sea-glass teal, salt-white sails, horizon light.

Kuryo.oneLine: Where the mind reaches for the summit.
Kuryo.landscape: High, thin-aired peaks — observatories and stairways cut into stone.
Kuryo.philosophy: Clarity is earned by climbing higher than comfort allows.
Kuryo.identity: Violet slate, star-charts, cold clear light.

Murei.landscape: A dense, patient forest of shaded groves and slow rivers.
Murei.philosophy: Whatever is worth growing is worth growing slowly.
Murei.identity: Deep greens, lantern moss, filtered gold light.

Maruto.landscape: Capitals, universities, and the Guild Headquarters rising together.
Maruto.philosophy: Community is the only monument that maintains itself.
Maruto.identity: Gold banners, bronze domes, festival light.

Harai.landscape: A scarred land of ash fields and stubborn green shoots.
Harai.philosophy: What falls out of balance can be carried back into it.

map.heading: The World Map
map.intro: One continent, five living regions — the anatomy every Giantverse continent shares. Move across the map, and the land will answer.

Neisei.lore: Every citizen's story starts on this coast, pulled outward by trade and curiosity.
Neisei.climate: Mild and windswept — salt air, long twilights.
Neisei.culture: Harbor markets, letter-couriers, a hundred spoken tongues.
Neisei.landmarks: The harbor lanterns, the salt road, the old lighthouse.
Neisei.description: The shoreline where the continent meets the wider world.

Kuryo.lore: Scholars climb for the kind of clarity that only altitude grants.
Kuryo.symbols: The summit star, the unrolled chart.
Kuryo.landmarks: The summit shrine, the starwatch tower, the frozen pass.
Kuryo.description: The mountain belt where thought is clearest.

Murei.lore: Trust and healing take shape here, far from the noise of the capitals.
Murei.climate: Humid understory — soft rain, green shade.
Murei.symbols: The rooted tree, the folded leaf.
Murei.landmarks: The whispering grove, the healing spring, the elder tree.
Murei.description: The patient forest that rewards slow growth.

Maruto.lore: Where community becomes something larger than any one person.
Maruto.culture: Guild halls, universities, the great assembly.
Maruto.symbols: The gold citadel, the woven ring.
Maruto.landmarks: The grand hall, the university spire, the guild bell.
Maruto.description: The beating civic heart of the continent.

Harai.lore: Not a fixed place — it is what the heart becomes when balance is lost, until the Great Turning restores it.
Harai.culture: Camps of survivors, rebuilders, and stubborn hope.
Harai.symbols: The cracked shield, the first green shoot.
Harai.landmarks: The ash camp, the long scar, the ember shrine.

compass.heading: The Giantverse Compass
compass.intro: Thirty-two archetypes arranged as one circle. Neighbors are natural allies; opposites answer the same question differently. Hover the ring to meet them.

north.name: Northern Hemisphere
north.description: Creators who reshape civilization through vision.

south.name: Southern Hemisphere
south.description: Protectors who strengthen civilization through relationships.

forgers.name: Forgers
forgers.description: Builders of systems — law, order, and strategy are their raw materials.

ascenders.name: Ascenders
ascenders.description: Visionaries — they imagine, connect, and grow what could be.

havens.name: Havens
havens.description: Guardians — they protect, heal, and endure for the people they love.

venturers.name: Venturers
venturers.description: Explorers — they seek horizons, carry stories, and master the craft of the road.

minshu.name: Democrat
minshu.motivation: Legitimacy must come from the consent of the many.
minshu.strength: Builds consensus where others force division.
minshu.blindSpot: Indecision — waiting for everyone to agree.
minshu.quote: I lead by listening — every voice shapes the path we walk together.

sabaki.name: Judge
sabaki.motivation: Fairness, weighed deliberately and without bias.
sabaki.strength: Sees through the noise to what is true.
sabaki.blindSpot: Self-righteousness — the rule chosen over mercy.
sabaki.quote: I hold the scale steady, even when the verdict costs me.

kanryo.name: Bureaucrat
kanryo.motivation: Order and process that shield everyone from chaos.
kanryo.strength: Diligence that works until it's right.
kanryo.blindSpot: Rigidity — serving the process over the people.
kanryo.quote: I build the structures that protect what matters from chaos.

sosai.name: Chancellor
sosai.motivation: Holding the center so the whole doesn't fall apart.
sosai.strength: Turns vision into something that survives reality.
sosai.blindSpot: Control — resisting the change the institution needs.
sosai.quote: I will hold the center so the whole does not fall apart.

senryaku.name: Strategist
senryaku.motivation: Winning the long game, one calculated move at a time.
senryaku.quote: Every move I make today is setting up tomorrow's victory.

gijutsu.name: Technocrat
gijutsu.motivation: Efficiency — solving with data, not drama.
gijutsu.quote: I solve what others accept — with data, not drama.

yogen.name: Oracle
yogen.motivation: Naming the pattern before it happens.
yogen.blindSpot: Certainty — a hunch mistaken for prophecy.
yogen.quote: I will speak the pattern I see, even when no one wants to hear it yet.

tetsugaku.name: Philosopher
tetsugaku.motivation: Understanding for its own sake, deeper than any answer.
tetsugaku.blindSpot: Paralysis — one question too many, one answer too late.
tetsugaku.quote: I will not stop asking until the world reveals what it truly is.

kenja.name: Sage
kenja.motivation: Letting truth settle slowly, then sharing it gently.
kenja.blindSpot: Passivity — wisdom offered too late to matter.
kenja.quote: I will wait for the truth to settle, and share it without needing credit.

rekishi.name: Historian
rekishi.motivation: Remembering honestly — triumphs and shame alike.
rekishi.strength: Holds the accurate record no one can erase.
rekishi.blindSpot: Resentment — a past that won't be put down.
rekishi.quote: I will remember honestly, even when forgetting would be easier.

riso.name: Visionary
riso.motivation: Futures sketched vividly enough to pull the world forward.
riso.blindSpot: Escapism — today left to fend for itself.
riso.quote: I will keep dreaming even when the world insists on staying as it is.

kenchiku.name: Architect
kenchiku.blindSpot: Detachment — forgetting who lives inside the design.
kenchiku.quote: I design what outlasts me — and that is enough.

gaiko.name: Diplomat
gaiko.motivation: Consensus over conflict, bridges over walls.
gaiko.strength: Holds every side of the table at once.
gaiko.quote: I build bridges where others build walls.

shisha.name: Messenger
shisha.motivation: Carrying truth to the people who need it most.
shisha.strength: Connects what would never otherwise meet.
shisha.blindSpot: Overextension — their own voice going quiet.
shisha.quote: I carry only what is real, to those who need it most.

hatsumei.name: Inventor
hatsumei.motivation: Finding a new way where the old ways ran out.
hatsumei.quote: I will find a new way where the old ways have run out.

nogyo.name: Farmer
nogyo.motivation: Greatness grown from repeated, unglamorous care.
nogyo.quote: I will tend what grows slowly, trusting the harvest will come.

kizoku.name: Aristocrat
kizoku.motivation: Leading with inherited certainty and presence.
kizoku.quote: I carry the weight of legacy and lead with the confidence it bestows.

banri.name: Warden
banri.motivation: Guarding boundaries others don't know exist.
banri.blindSpot: Suspicion — threats seen where there are none.
banri.quote: I will hold this line, long after everyone else has forgotten why it matters.

kaikaku.name: Reformer
kaikaku.motivation: Refusing a broken world when a better one is possible.
kaikaku.blindSpot: Zealotry — burning what was merely imperfect.
kaikaku.quote: I will not accept a broken world when a better one is possible.

kaitaku.name: Pathfinder
kaitaku.motivation: The frontier, never comfort, as the destination.
kaitaku.blindSpot: Isolation — pushing too far past the frontier.
kaitaku.quote: I reject comfort as a destination — the frontier is where I belong.

mamori.name: Guardian
mamori.motivation: Shielding what they love, whatever it costs.
mamori.blindSpot: Smothering — protecting past the point of growth.
mamori.quote: I will shield what I love, even when it costs me everything.

iyashi.name: Healer
iyashi.motivation: Easing what hurts, protecting what heals.
iyashi.blindSpot: Self-erasure — nothing left for their own wounds.
iyashi.quote: I will ease what hurts, and protect what heals.

kensetsu.name: Builder
kensetsu.motivation: Making it real with their own hands.
kensetsu.blindSpot: Obsession — never noticing what the work costs.
kensetsu.quote: I will make something real that endures long after I am gone.

seizon.name: Survivor
seizon.blindSpot: Distrust — no one allowed close enough.
seizon.quote: I will rise from the ash, proving that our light cannot be crushed.

teisatsu.name: Scout
teisatsu.motivation: Going first, so others know the way is possible.
teisatsu.blindSpot: Recklessness — leaping before anyone can follow.
teisatsu.quote: I go first — so others know the way is possible.

monogatari.name: Storyteller
monogatari.motivation: Keeping identity and meaning alive across generations.
monogatari.strength: Around their fire, people remember who they are.
monogatari.blindSpot: Mythologizing — the polish hiding the truth.
monogatari.quote: I will keep telling the story, so no one forgets who we are.

hozon.name: Custodian
hozon.motivation: Refusing to let what matters slip away.
hozon.quote: I will hold on to what matters, long after others have let it go.

tansa.name: Explorer
tansa.motivation: Discovery — limitation feared more than the unknown.
tansa.strength: Courage at the edge of the map.
tansa.blindSpot: Rootlessness — never staying long enough to build.
tansa.quote: I will go where no map exists and make my own path.

koro.name: Navigator
koro.motivation: Finding the true course through hidden currents.
koro.blindSpot: Overcontrol — trusting only their own reading.
koro.quote: I will find the true course, even when the stars are hidden.

yuei.name: Ranger
yuei.motivation: Walking lightly between the wild and the world.
yuei.blindSpot: Non-commitment — belonging fully to neither world.
yuei.quote: I will walk lightly, so what I protect still has somewhere to stand.

shokunin.name: Artisan
shokunin.motivation: Mastery — every task given its full weight.
shokunin.blindSpot: Perfectionism — the work never called finished.
shokunin.quote: I will give every task the full weight of my ability.

takumi.name: Craftsman
takumi.motivation: Excellence living in the smallest details.
takumi.quote: I will refine this until it is right, no matter how long that takes.

journey.heading: How does Giantverse discover your archetype?

steps.title: Resonate
steps.caption: Your responses generate confidence scores across eight dimensions.

promises: The assessment measures natural preferences — not intelligence, success, or talent.

cta.heading: Your name is already out there.
cta.sub: Thirty-two archetypes. Five realms. One of them has been waiting for you.

errors.firstNameLettersOnly: Use letters only, starting with a letter.
errors.dayMonthMismatch: That day doesn't exist in the selected month.

survey.answerHonestly: {firstName}, answer honestly — there are no right answers.
